asset_return_policy.default: Do not include, copy, zip, duplicate, or return real files from the assets/ folder in future ChatGPT edits.
asset_return_policy.exception: Only include real assets when the user explicitly asks for specific asset files to be returned.

path_policy.deployment_expectation: The real assets remain in the GitHub/local assets folder at the exact paths listed in the manifests.

future_chatgpt_edit_rules: Treat assets/ as an external mounted asset library unless the user explicitly says to return assets.
When editing code, wire references to existing assets/ relative paths instead of embedding or copying files.
When sending zip bundles, include only manifest JSON files under assets/ unless the user explicitly requests actual asset files.
Keep every existing asset subfolder name intact.
Use assets/asset_manifest_index.json and assets/**/manifest.json to find valid asset paths.
